release_notes: Hardening patch from a full code review of 1.0.10. Most important: a measurement that crashed during analysis could silently drop out of the report while the file still showed PASS — crashed checks now surface as explicit FAILs, and an empty report can never pass. The app's local helper server is no longer reachable from websites in your browser (tightened CORS + cross-site request blocking), and a path-traversal hole in temp uploads is closed. Also: trial banner now correctly says 7 days, and numbered PDF exports no longer skip numbers after a cancelled save dialog. Measurements, dylibs and fonts untouched.
